title: post request to solicitar correccion endpoint
description: Verify that an authenticated admin can successfully request a correction for a candidate by sending a POST request to /formapp/admin/applicants/{id}/solicitar-correccion/. The request should include the fields to correct and a message. Confirm that a unique token is generated and an email is sent to the candidate.

title: get request to obtener formulario de correccion with valid token
description: Verify that a GET request to /formapp/actualizar-datos/{token}/ with a valid UUID token returns a pre-filled correction form with only the specified fields enabled for editing.

title: get request to obtener formulario de correccion with invalid or expired token
description: Verify that a GET request to /formapp/actualizar-datos/{token}/ with an invalid or expired token returns a 404 response indicating the token is invalid or expired.

title: post request to enviar correcciones del candidato with valid token
description: Verify that a POST request to /formapp/actualizar-datos/{token}/ with a valid token and multipart/form-data containing corrections saves the changes, sends a notification email to the admin, and updates the candidate's status to CORREGIDO.
